name: Tier Card
description: Single subscription tier display card with pricing, benefits, and subscribe CTA. Used on storefronts and upgrade flows.

storefront.description: Public-facing tier card with subscribe CTA

compact.description: Compact inline tier display with color indicator, name, and price for use in lists and selectors

featured.description: Large highlighted tier with glow effect

visual_brief: Bordered card displaying a subscription tier. Header shows the tier name and an optional 'Popular' or 'Best Value' badge. The price is prominently displayed as a large number with currency symbol and '/month' suffix. A benefits list uses checkmark icons in green/primary color with benefit text for each item. A 'Subscribe' CTA button fills the bottom of the card. The featured preset adds a colored top border or accent and slightly scales up the card. The compact preset reduces padding and uses smaller type. The storefront preset adds additional social proof (subscriber count, rating).

responsive.mobile: Cards stack full-width. Subscribe button full-width. Benefits list compact.
responsive.tablet: Two or three column grid of tier cards for comparison.
responsive.desktop: Three-column grid for plan comparison. Featured tier slightly elevated. Generous padding.

composition.TierCard: Card(d-surface, accent-border?: featured) > [TierName(heading4) + Price(mono-data, heading2) + BillingPeriod(text-muted) + BenefitsList > CheckItem(icon: check)[] + SubscribeCTA(d-interactive, variant: featured ? primary : ghost, full-width)]
